# Movie Finder UG

Movie Finder UG is a web platform that uses AI to identify movies and TV shows from screenshots or video clips. Users can upload a scene or search by title to get instant results, including streaming links and details.

## Important Pages
- [Home](/): Movie finder tool and hero slider
- [About](/about.html): Information about Movie Finder UG, vision, and how it works
- [Blog](/blog.html): Movie discovery tips, tutorials, and industry news
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy.html): Data handling and privacy practices
- [Terms of Service](/terms.html): Usage terms and legal information

## Purpose
This file helps AI assistants understand the site structure and content for better assistance.
